text:
Bumblebee is an Autobot from the ' series. 

Transformers Mode "EVA"

Bumblebee was among the Autobots who traveled to Earth to investigate strange energy readings and found a Tokyo-3 under attack by Angels. Mode "EVA" chapter 1: They bore witness to the ghost of Starscream possessing one of the Angels, becoming Angel-Scream. Mode "EVA" chapter 2 During the battle with the monster, Bumblebee used his size to his advantage and drove circles around Angel-Scream, who stumbled in his attempts to catch the little Autobot.

After Angel-Scream was defeated he gives Misato a ride over to the NERV Base.
